rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE BERNARD L. SHAIN TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Allen Shain To Comply With Demand For Inspection And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Steven and Carolyn's Motion to Compel Compliance with Demand for Inspection is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. It is granted with respect to the inspection of the Allen family's two apartments and any vacant apartments in the 970 Bay Street property. The motion is denied with respect tot he inspection of the third party tenants' apartments. The inspection shall occur no later than two weeks from the date of this order. The request for sanctions is denied. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 4/28/2015.
